notebooks.title: Workflow guide
notebooks.summary: Choose the workflow that matches the next analysis question.

notebooks.title: End-to-end workflow
notebooks.summary: Run the complete fit-review-export arc and preserve the evidence that makes a result reportable.

notebooks.title: Public cohort explorer
notebooks.summary: Explore mSigPortal public spectra and TCGA/GDC MAF-derived datasets, load them into one SDK shape, visualize cohorts, and export inputs.

notebooks.title: Resource portability
notebooks.summary: Prove that public resource data survive SDK table conversion, file export, reload, and handoff without losing metadata.

notebooks.title: Variant rows to mutation patterns
notebooks.summary: Turn variant rows into a checked 96-bin mutation pattern by sorting DNA changes, checking counts, and saving the proof trail.

notebooks.title: Known-signature quality check
notebooks.summary: Unpack mutation burden, reconstruction, residuals, warnings, and review steps behind a known-signature fit.

notebooks.title: Cohort and panel workflow
notebooks.summary: Connect cohort metadata, group interpretation, and restricted-assay limits in one applied workflow.

notebooks.title: Panel/WES evidence review
notebooks.summary: Review panel/WES signature calls with assay coverage, mutation-count, and support-tier evidence.

notebooks.title: Discovery extraction (NMF)
notebooks.summary: Extract candidate signatures from spectra, inspect rank checks, and prepare production extraction files.

notebooks.title: Uncertainty and cutoffs
notebooks.summary: Stress-test fitted signature calls with bootstrap intervals and reporting cutoff sweeps.

notebooks.title: Export and reports
notebooks.summary: Check round trips, required report fields, provenance, and run records needed to rerun or review an analysis.

notebooks.title: Multi-tool comparison
notebooks.summary: Compare fitting engines on identical spectra and inspect package-level and sample-level disagreements.

notebooks.title: Experimental sandbox
notebooks.summary: Expose experimental workflow status, warnings, limits, and validation requirements before any output is trusted.
